headline: What Palantir Technologies (PLTR)'s Upgraded 2026 Outlook and Rising ESG Scrutiny Means For Shareholders
summary: In May 2026, Palantir Technologies reported first-quarter 2026 results with revenue of US$1.63 billion and net income of US$870.53 million, while raising its full-year revenue guidance to between US$7.65 billion and US$7.66 billion and confirming expectations for GAAP profitability in every quarter. Ahead of its 2026 annual meeting, Palantir is also facing rising shareholder pressure on social issues, as Investor Advocates for Social Justice backed a proposal from the Congregation of the...

headline: Palantir (PLTR) Must Arbitrate Claims made by Former Staffers who Started a Rival Company, Judge says
summary: Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:PLTR) is one of the 9 Most Profitable Tech Stocks to Buy Right Now. On May 13, 2026, Reuters reported that US District Judge Paul Oetken ordered Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:PLTR) to arbitrate claims accusing three former engineers of using confidential information to build rival firm Percepta AI. The District Judge rejected […]
